description: You are an HR analyst processing employee records in /home/ga/Documents/hr_data.xlsx. In the 'Employees' sheet, calculate 'AnnualIncome' (MonthlyIncome in column D multiplied by 12) in column O and 'ExperienceCategory' in column P. Categorize experience based on TotalWorkingYears in column E: 'Junior' for less than 5 years, 'Mid-Level' for 5 to 15 years inclusive, and 'Senior' for over 15 years. Create a new sheet named 'Summary' containing a department analysis table starting at A1 for the 'Human Resources', 'Research & Development', and 'Sales' departments. The table must include the following metrics: HeadCount, AvgMonthlyIncome, TotalMonthlyPayroll, AttritionCount (based on 'Yes' values in column H), and AttritionRate. Save the completed workbook to /home/ga/Documents/hr_analysis_complete.xlsx.

metadata.data_source: IBM HR Analytics Employee Attrition Dataset
